Layer
sourceCode: type Layer = 'interface' | 'business' | 'data' | 'utility' | 'unknown';

name: SymbolKind
sourceCode:
type SymbolKind =
  | 'class'
  | 'function'
  | 'method'
  | 'variable'
  | 'interface'
  | 'type'
  | 'enum'
  | 'module'
  | 'constant'
  | 'property'
  | 'namespace';

name: RelationshipKind
sourceCode:
type RelationshipKind =
  | 'calls'          // A calls B
  | 'imports'        // A imports from B's file
  | 'extends'        // A extends B (class inheritance)
  | 'implements'     // A implements B (interface)
  | 'contains'       // A contains B (parent-child, e.g. class → method)
  | 'uses_type'      // A references B as a type
  | 'overrides'      // A overrides B
  | 'exports'        // A exports B
  | 'creates'        // A instantiates B (new B())
  | 'decorates';

fileToNoteName
sourceCode:
private fileToNoteName(filePath: string): string {
    return filePath
      .replace(/[/\\]/g, '-')           // Replace path separators
      .replace(/\./g, '-')              // Replace dots
      .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_]/g, '')  // Remove special chars
      .replace(/-+/g, '-')              // Collapse multiple dashes
      .replace(/^-|-$/g, '');           // Trim dashes
  }
docComment:

   * e.g. "src/services/user-service.ts" → "src-services-user-service-ts"

getPlaceholderHtml
sourceCode:
function getPlaceholderHtml(port: number, hasDb: boolean): string { return ` CodeAtlas

🗺️ CodeAtlas

API Server running on port ${port}

Database Status

${hasDb ? '✅ Connected' : '⚠️ Not found - Run codeatlas scan first'}

API Endpoints

  • GET /api/graph - Get graph data
  • GET /api/stats - Get statistics

WebSocket

Connect to ws://localhost:${port} for real-time updates

Web Visualization

To enable the full visualization:

  1. Build the web package: cd packages/web && npm run build
  2. Restart this server: codeatlas serve
`; }

name: upsertSymbol
sourceCode:
upsertSymbol(symbol: Symbol): void {
    // Delete existing if present (simulates ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE)
    this.run('DELETE FROM symbols WHERE id = ?', [symbol.id]);
    this.run(`
      INSERT INTO symbols (id, name, kind, file_path, start_line, end_line, start_col, end_col,
                           source_code, language, layer, doc_comment, ai_summary, complexity, exported, metadata)
      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
    `, [
      symbol.id,
      symbol.name,
      symbol.kind,
      symbol.filePath,
      symbol.startLine,
      symbol.endLine,
      symbol.startCol ?? null,
      symbol.endCol ?? null,
      symbol.sourceCode ?? null,
      symbol.language,
      symbol.layer,
      symbol.docComment ?? null,
      symbol.aiSummary ?? null,
      symbol.complexity ?? null,
      symbol.exported ? 1 : 0,
      symbol.metadata ? JSON.stringify(symbol.metadata) : null,
    ]);
  }
docComment: /** Insert or update a symbol */

name: rowToRelationship
rowToSymbol
sourceCode:
private rowToSymbol(row: any): Symbol {
    return {
      id: row.id,
      name: row.name,
      kind: row.kind as SymbolKind,
      filePath: row.file_path,
      startLine: row.start_line,
      endLine: row.end_line,
      startCol: row.start_col,
      endCol: row.end_col,
      sourceCode: row.source_code,
      language: row.language,
      layer: row.layer as Layer,
      docComment: row.doc_comment,
      aiSummary: row.ai_summary,
      complexity: row.complexity,
      exported: !!row.exported,
      metadata: row.metadata ? JSON.parse(row.metadata) : undefined,
    };
  }
